does_not_prove_belgian_nationality.name: does_not_prove_belgian_nationality
does_not_prove_belgian_nationality.description: The person does not provide proof of Belgian nationality.

is_foreigner.name: is_foreigner
is_foreigner.description: The person is legally classified as a foreigner.

is_not_union_citizen.name: is_not_union_citizen
is_not_union_citizen.description: The person is not a citizen of the Union.

not_covered_by_free_movement_law.name: not_covered_by_free_movement_law
not_covered_by_free_movement_law.description: The person is not covered by free movement law.

is_third_country_national.name: is_third_country_national
is_third_country_national.description: The person is legally classified as a third-country national.

present_on_territory.name: present_on_territory
present_on_territory.description: The person is present on the territory.

does_not_meet_entry_or_stay_conditions.name: does_not_meet_entry_or_stay_conditions
does_not_meet_entry_or_stay_conditions.description: The person does not meet, or no longer meets, the conditions for entry to or stay on the territory.

is_in_illegal_stay.name: is_in_illegal_stay
is_in_illegal_stay.description: The person's presence is legally classified as illegal stay.

has_valid_travel_document.name: has_valid_travel_document
has_valid_travel_document.description: The person possesses a valid travel document.

has_valid_passport.name: has_valid_passport
has_valid_passport.description: The person possesses a valid passport.

has_valid_identity_document.name: has_valid_identity_document
has_valid_identity_document.description: The person possesses a valid identity document.

recognized_as_national_by_country_author.name: recognized_as_national_by_country_authority
recognized_as_national_by_country_author.description: The person has been recognized as a national by the national authority of the person's country.

country_authority_willing_to_issue_laiss.name: country_authority_willing_to_issue_laissez_passer
country_authority_willing_to_issue_laiss.description: The national authority of the person's country has declared willingness to issue a laissez-passer for the person.

nationality_category_minister_can_issue_.name: nationality_category_minister_can_issue_laissez_passer
nationality_category_minister_can_issue_.description: The person falls within a nationality category for which the minister can issue a laissez-passer.

has_any_valid_identity_or_travel_documen.name: has_any_valid_identity_or_travel_document
has_any_valid_identity_or_travel_documen.description: The person has a valid travel document, passport, or identity document for purposes of identification.

identified_by_country_authority.name: identified_by_country_authority
identified_by_country_authority.description: The person is identifiable through recognition by the national authority of the person's country and that authority's willingness to issue a laissez-passer.

is_identified_foreigner.name: is_identified_foreigner
is_identified_foreigner.description: The foreigner is legally classified as an identified foreigner.

subject_to_removal_procedure.name: subject_to_removal_procedure
subject_to_removal_procedure.description: The person is subject to a removal procedure.

subject_to_international_protection_proc.name: subject_to_international_protection_procedure
subject_to_international_protection_proc.description: The person is subject to a procedure for granting international protection.

subject_to_responsible_member_state_dete.name: subject_to_responsible_member_state_determination_or_transfer_procedure
subject_to_responsible_member_state_dete.description: The person is subject to a procedure to determine the member state responsible for an international protection request or to transfer the person to that member state.

subject_to_relevant_absconding_risk_proc.name: subject_to_relevant_absconding_risk_procedure
subject_to_relevant_absconding_risk_proc.description: The person is subject to a procedure relevant to assessment of risk of absconding.

reasons_to_believe_will_abscond_are_curr.name: reasons_to_believe_will_abscond_are_current_and_real
reasons_to_believe_will_abscond_are_curr.description: There are current and real reasons to believe that the person will abscond.

individual_examination_performed.name: individual_examination_performed
individual_examination_performed.description: An individual examination of the person has been performed.

all_case_circumstances_considered.name: all_case_circumstances_considered
all_case_circumstances_considered.description: All circumstances specific to the person's case have been considered.

absconding_risk_assessment_requirements_.name: absconding_risk_assessment_requirements_met
absconding_risk_assessment_requirements_.description: The current-and-real risk, individual examination, and case-circumstance requirements for establishing risk of absconding are met.

no_residence_application_after_illegal_e.name: no_residence_application_after_illegal_entry
no_residence_application_after_illegal_e.description: The person filed no residence application after illegal entry.

no_residence_application_during_illegal_.name: no_residence_application_during_illegal_stay
no_residence_application_during_illegal_.description: The person filed no residence application during illegal stay.

international_protection_request_not_wit.name: international_protection_request_not_within_legal_time_limit
international_protection_request_not_wit.description: The person did not make a request for international protection within the legal time limit.

application_omission_criterion.name: application_omission_criterion
application_omission_criterion.description: The application-omission objective criterion for risk of absconding is met.

used_false_or_misleading_information_in_.name: used_false_or_misleading_information_in_procedure
used_false_or_misleading_information_in_.description: The person used false or misleading information in an international protection, residence, removal, or refusal-at-border procedure.

used_false_or_forged_documents_in_proced.name: used_false_or_forged_documents_in_procedure
used_false_or_forged_documents_in_proced.description: The person used false or forged documents in an international protection, residence, removal, or refusal-at-border procedure.

committed_fraud_in_procedure.name: committed_fraud_in_procedure
committed_fraud_in_procedure.description: The person committed fraud in an international protection, residence, removal, or refusal-at-border procedure.

used_other_unlawful_means_in_procedure.name: used_other_unlawful_means_in_procedure
used_other_unlawful_means_in_procedure.description: The person used other unlawful means in an international protection, residence, removal, or refusal-at-border procedure.

deception_or_fraud_criterion.name: deception_or_fraud_criterion
deception_or_fraud_criterion.description: The deception, fraud, or unlawful-means objective criterion for risk of absconding is met.

does_not_cooperate_with_immigration_auth.name: does_not_cooperate_with_immigration_authorities
does_not_cooperate_with_immigration_auth.description: The person does not cooperate with authorities responsible for regulation of access to the territory, stay, establishment, or removal of foreigners.

has_not_cooperated_with_immigration_auth.name: has_not_cooperated_with_immigration_authorities
has_not_cooperated_with_immigration_auth.description: The person has not cooperated with authorities responsible for regulation of access to the territory, stay, establishment, or removal of foreigners.

non_cooperation_criterion.name: non_cooperation_criterion
non_cooperation_criterion.description: The non-cooperation objective criterion for risk of absconding is met.

unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_trans.name: unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_transfer_refusal_or_removal_measure
unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_trans.description: The person made clear unwillingness to comply with, or already failed to comply with, a transfer, refusal-at-border, or removal measure.

unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_unsus.name: unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_unsuspended_entry_ban
unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_unsus.description: The person made clear unwillingness to comply with, or already failed to comply with, an entry ban that has not been lifted or suspended.

unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_less_.name: unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_less_coercive_guarantee_measure
unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_less_.description: The person made clear unwillingness to comply with, or already failed to comply with, a less coercive measure intended to guarantee transfer, refusal-at-border, or removal.

unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_publi.name: unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_public_order_security_restriction
unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_publi.description: The person made clear unwillingness to comply with, or already failed to comply with, a liberty-restricting measure intended to ensure public order or national security.

unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_equiv.name: unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_equivalent_member_state_measure
unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_equiv.description: The person made clear unwillingness to comply with, or already failed to comply with, an equivalent measure taken by another member state.

measure_non_compliance_criterion.name: measure_non_compliance_criterion
measure_non_compliance_criterion.description: The measure non-compliance objective criterion for risk of absconding is met.

subject_to_unsuspended_entry_ban.name: subject_to_unsuspended_entry_ban
subject_to_unsuspended_entry_ban.description: The person is subject to an entry ban in the state or another member state that has not been lifted or suspended.

unsuspended_entry_ban_criterion.name: unsuspended_entry_ban_criterion
unsuspended_entry_ban_criterion.description: The unsuspended entry-ban objective criterion for risk of absconding is met.

submitted_new_application_immediately_af.name: submitted_new_application_immediately_after_negative_or_ending_decision_or_removal_measure
submitted_new_application_immediately_af.description: The person submitted a new residence application or international protection request immediately after a refusal of entry or stay, a decision ending stay, or a refusal-at-border or removal measure.

repeat_application_after_decision_criter.name: repeat_application_after_decision_criterion
repeat_application_after_decision_criter.description: The immediate repeat-application objective criterion for risk of absconding is met.

concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_responsi.name: concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_responsible_state_when_questioned
concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_responsi.description: When questioned on the point, the person concealed having previously given fingerprints in another state bound by the rules on determining the state responsible for an international protection request, after making an international protection request.

concealed_prior_fingerprints_criterion.name: concealed_prior_fingerprints_criterion
concealed_prior_fingerprints_criterion.description: The concealed-prior-fingerprints objective criterion for risk of absconding is met.

multiple_protection_requests_or_residenc.name: multiple_protection_requests_or_residence_applications_with_negative_or_no_title_outcome
multiple_protection_requests_or_residenc.description: The person filed multiple international protection requests or residence applications in the state or in one or more other member states that led to a negative decision or did not lead to issuance of a residence title.

multiple_failed_applications_criterion.name: multiple_failed_applications_criterion
multiple_failed_applications_criterion.description: The multiple failed applications objective criterion for risk of absconding is met.

concealed_prior_protection_request_in_re.name: concealed_prior_protection_request_in_responsible_state_when_questioned
concealed_prior_protection_request_in_re.description: When questioned on the point, the person concealed having previously made an international protection request in another state bound by the rules on determining the state responsible for an international protection request.

concealed_prior_protection_request_crite.name: concealed_prior_protection_request_criterion
concealed_prior_protection_request_crite.description: The concealed-prior-protection-request objective criterion for risk of absconding is met.

came_for_purpose_other_than_application_.name: came_for_purpose_other_than_application_purpose
came_for_purpose_other_than_application_.description: The person declared, or the file shows, that the person came to the territory for purposes other than those of the international protection request or residence application submitted.

different_purpose_for_entry_criterion.name: different_purpose_for_entry_criterion
different_purpose_for_entry_criterion.description: The different-purpose objective criterion for risk of absconding is met.

fined_for_manifestly_unlawful_immigratio.name: fined_for_manifestly_unlawful_immigration_appeal
fined_for_manifestly_unlawful_immigratio.description: The person is subject to a fine for bringing a manifestly unlawful immigration appeal.

manifestly_unlawful_appeal_fine_criterio.name: manifestly_unlawful_appeal_fine_criterion
manifestly_unlawful_appeal_fine_criterio.description: The manifestly unlawful appeal fine objective criterion for risk of absconding is met.

at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met.name: at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met
at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met.description: At least one statutory objective criterion for risk of absconding is met for the person.

risk_of_absconding.name: risk_of_absconding
risk_of_absconding.description: The person is legally classified as presenting a risk of absconding.
